description: List of valuable goods with prices in the tens of dinars. The name Shemuel b. Moshe appears twice. Evidently jottings of accounts (or part of a trousseau list?). In the same hand there is a Judaeo-Arabic poem or prayer. In a different hand, there are Hebrew verses.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
